steps.t: You will need Hidâti's help to banish Ishími, the Anguished Wind. You should talk to Hidâti.
Hidâti has a plan to banish Ishími, the Anguished Wind from the Dawn-warden. You should place Kâparai wards and heal the spirits of frightened Aradûni…
Ishími has begun manifesting near the statue of Izighûz Menûndari. You should find the cyclone of wind near the statue.
You must defeat the coalesced form of Ishími, the Anguished Wind to banish it from the Dawn-warden! You must place the final Kâparai ward near the cyc…
Ishími has successfully been banished. You should talk to Captain Hanâbu.
